calendar.matters:
PETITION For Order Transferring Property
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Bernstein for Louise Dickens (Petitioner).

The Court modified the Order as follows: 1)Bruce Bernstein is appointed the Receiver. 2) The Court is to retain jurisdiction to approve distributions from his account. The Court instructed the receiver to file a petition for authority to distribute. Mr. Bernstein stated that he would pay the filing fees. The matter was granted. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith

PETITION For Order Transferring Property
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Continued To Nov-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Bernstein appeared for petitioner Louise Dickens.

The Court stated the rule cited does not cover when an attorney dies and that the money should go to the client. Mr Bernstein responded that it's been 6 years since her passing and no one has come forward. The Court pointed out that the death certificate indicated a surviving spouse, and if the money belongs to the attorney, then the money in the trust account should go to her estate. The Court stated that an order could not be made based on whats been presented. The matter was continued to November 05, 2007. The Court

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
